title: Psychopomp Helmets
description: The Psychopomp from hit games Psychopomp and Psychopomp GOLD
body:
# _"There are catacombs under every naturally generated structure."_
A resource pack that adds two versions of the "Machine that Lets Me Read People's Minds When I Want To", or Psychopomp for short.

The helmets must be given to a player via commands, which are listed below.

For 1.20.5 to 1.21.1, the helmets will be remodeled carved pumpkins, meaning that they will prevent you angering an endermen.

For 1.20.2 and abovve, the helmets will be remodeled iron nuggets, and will also come with a custom tooltip texture.

**Psychopomp** and **Psychopomp GOLD** are made by [Fading Club](https://fadingclub.neocities.org/)

Custom skin by [@parfaitparty.neocities.org](https://bsky.app/profile/did:plc:sjlx7ugpodx6ddstlu6alwud)

## **COMMANDS**
1.20.5 ~ 1.21.1

Regular

/give @s minecraft:carved_pumpkin[minecraft:custom_model_data=1, minecraft:custom_name='["",{"text":"Psychopomp","italic":false,"color":"#7b6913"}]']

Gold

/give @s minecraft:carved_pumpkin[minecraft:custom_model_data=2, minecraft:custom_name='["",{"text":"Psychopomp GOLD","italic":false,"color":"#7b6913"}]']

1.21.2 and above

Regular

/give @s iron_nugget[minecraft:custom_model_data=1,minecraft:custom_name='["",{"text":"Psychopomp","italic":false,"color":"#7b6913"}]',minecraft:equippable={slot:head},minecraft:tooltip_style='psychopomp:psychopomp']

Gold

/give @s iron_nugget[minecraft:custom_model_data=2,minecraft:custom_name='["",{"text":"Psychopomp GOLD","italic":false,"color":"#7b6913"}]',minecraft:equippable={slot:head},minecraft:tooltip_style='psychopomp:psychopomp']
